message:
Refactor permissions, SSE buffer handling, and miscellaneous improvements

Permission store improvements (src/permissions.rs):
- Make list() and days_to_ymd() const fn for compile-time evaluation
- Simplify expiry filter using is_none_or() (Rust 1.81+)
- Add 4 new tests: corrupt_file_returns_error, list_returns_all_decisions,
  concurrent_open_does_not_lose_data, empty_extension_id_works

SSE buffer optimization (src/sse.rs):
- Refactor UTF-8 buffer handling to avoid intermediate String allocations
  by using std::mem::take() to move buffer ownership during parsing
- Replace trailing-bytes vec allocation with in-place drain()
- Cleaner borrow-checker-friendly structure for feed-parse-retain cycle

Print mode auto-detection (src/main.rs):
- Auto-enable print mode when positional message args (e.g. pi "hello")
  are provided without explicit --print flag, matching CLI ergonomics

Test and code cleanup:
- src/tui.rs: Remove unnecessary mut from console in 3 test helpers
- tests/compaction_bug.rs: Use struct literal with ..Default::default()
- tests/tui_snapshot.rs: Add collapsed: false to ConversationMessage
  helper functions for updated schema

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
